The `(... ∘ₗ ...) z` form does not contain an explicit ⇑(... ∘ₗ ...) coercion for these lemmas to rewrite.
The smul on Z₂ at j routes through perI₂ j (presheaf restriction map), while the LHS goes through the differential. Equality is non-trivial — needs S6–S8 proper.

findings.blocker: h_epi (the surjectivity-of-cotangent-descent half of the conjunction): typeclass-coercion blocker identical to iter-081. The natural module instance on `(relativeDifferentials f).val.obj U` is over the forget₂-image ring `(R ⋙ forget₂ CommRingCat RingCat).obj U`, NOT directly over `R.obj U`. Submodule.span_induction's `D b` case fails with 'x : ?m is not an inductive datatype' under the bundled Algebra setup. KaehlerDifferential.map_surjective cannot be applied directly — type mismatch between bundled and unbundled forms. exact_iff_stalkwise NOT introduced (per conditional clause: would have shifted 5 → 6).

next_steps: Iter-083+: Three options from prover task result. (A) Refactor approach: extract η-coherence as top-level helper `cotangentExactSeqBeta_hη`; with hη available externally, use `algebraize` for algebra+tower setup, then `convert KaehlerDifferential.map_surjective using 1`. Refactor-subagent eligible. (B) Direct in-line route continued with cleaner type handling: use `let A_fg : Type _ := (... .obj U).carrier` named bindings (NOT `(... .obj U : Type _)` inline) to prevent re-elaboration; build fac_ring without going through CommRingCat.Hom.hom of ≫. (C) Stalkwise-only: skip h_epi Route 2; build SheafOfModules.exact_iff_stalkwise (multi-iter TopCat-stalk chain) and use it to close BOTH h_exact AND h_epi, avoiding the bundled/unbundled identification entirely. Plan agent should pick one path and commit to it; trying all three serially has been the iter-076 → 081 pattern with no closure.
